elements.description: combined flight, floor1 to floor2 via landing
'ดูแบบขยาย 1' at the upper landing newel post, referencing view2 (railing detail) on this same page
'ดูแบบขยาย 2' at mid-stringer, referencing view3 (handrail bracket detail) on this same page
'ดูแบบขยาย 3' at the base of the stair, referencing view4 (tread/riser detail) on this same page

warnings: CONFIRMS the structural stair rise: this section's 18 steps @0.175m = 3.15m total rise EXACTLY matches the combined total of structural sheets S-11 (10 steps, 1.75m) + S-12 (8 steps, 1.40m) = 18 steps, 3.15m. Strong cross-discipline confirmation.

One of 4 views on this page; siblings are the railing detail (_view2_st3_railing_detail.json), handrail bracket detail (_view3_st3_handrail_bracket_detail.json), and tread/riser detail (_view4_st3_tread_riser_detail.json). Unlike house #4 (which had only 2 detail callouts, 1 and 3, with '2' referenced but not found), this house's section shows all 3 detail callouts (1, 2, 3) with matching detail views actually present on this page.
